ddls:
CREATE TABLE "video_representations" (
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video representation */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video the representation belongs to */,
  "representation_index" INTEGER /* Index of the representation */,
  "is_best" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the representation is the best quality */,
  "mvm" REAL /* Mean vector magnitude (MVM) */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) */,
  "msssim" REAL /* Multiscale Structural Similarity Index (MSSSIM) */,
  "vqm" REAL /* Video Quality Metric (VQM) */,
  "strred" REAL /* Structural Temporal Redundancy Reduction (STRRED) */,
  "vmaf" REAL /* Video Multi-Method Assessment Fusion (VMAF) */,
  "ssimplus" REAL /* SSIM Plus */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used for the representation */,
  "bitrate" REAL /* Bitrate of the representation in kbps */,
  "framerate" REAL /* Framerate of the representation in frames per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_representations_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in MB */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "resolution_width" INTEGER /* Width of the video resolution */,
  "resolution_height" INTEGER /* Height of the video resolution */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_chunks" (
  "chunk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video chunk */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video representation the chunk belongs to */,
  "chunk_index" INTEGER /* Index of the chunk within the representation */,
  "chunk_duration" REAL /* Duration of the chunk in seconds */,
  "video_bitrate" REAL /* Bitrate of the chunk in kbps */,
  "qp" REAL /* Quantization parameter (QP) */,
  "framerate" INTEGER /* Framerate of the chunk in frames per second */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the chunk resolution */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the chunk resolution */,
  "rebuffering_duration" REAL /* Duration of rebuffering in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the chunk */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the chunk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chunk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_chunks_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES video_representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "chunk_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video chunk the metrics belong to */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) */,
  "msssim" REAL /* Multiscale Structural Similarity Index (MSSSIM) */,
  "vqm" REAL /* Video Quality Metric (VQM) */,
  "strred" REAL /* Structural Temporal Redundancy Reduction (STRRED) */,
  "vmaf" REAL /* Video Multi-Method Assessment Fusion (VMAF) */,
  "ssimplus" REAL /* SSIM Plus */,
  "mos" REAL /* Mean Opinion Score (MOS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_chunk_id FOREIGN KEY ("chunk_id") REFERENCES video_chunks ("chunk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., mobile, desktop, tablet) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device (e.g., iPhone 12) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the device in hours */,
  "storage_capacity" REAL /* Storage capacity of the device in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who streamed the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being streamed */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for streaming */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the streaming session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the streaming session */,
  "total_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the session in seconds */,
  "rebuffering_duration" REAL /* Total rebuffering duration during the session in seconds */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network used for streaming (e.g., Wi-Fi, cellular) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during streaming (e.g., home, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES user_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content creator) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming session the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the content creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the content creator */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator's channel */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the creator's channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video ownership record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator who owns the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the video (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License of the video (e.g., public domain, creative commons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_owners_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_owners_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_analytics" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views of the video */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Total watch time of the video in seconds */,
  "average_view_duration" REAL /* Average view duration of the video in seconds */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement of the video (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "rebuffering_count" INTEGER /* Total number of rebuffering events for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Watch time of the user for the video in seconds */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement of the user for the video (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "rebuffering_count" INTEGER /* Number of rebuffering events for the user and video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_analysis" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming session */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network used for the session (e.g., Wi-Fi, cellular) */,
  "ping_time" REAL /* Ping time of the network in milliseconds */,
  "download_speed" REAL /* Download speed of the network in Mbps */,
  "upload_speed" REAL /* Upload speed of the network in Mbps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_analysis" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the session */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the device during the session */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the device during the session */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_analysis_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES user_devices ("device_id")
)
